name: factory_incident
title: Factory Incident
narrative: Zone-D: a normal shift escalates through a restricted-zone entry, a PPE violation, a gas leak that worsens, and a small fire, before emergency response and incident resolution bring the zone back to a safe state.

rows.label: Normal
rows.narration: Shift start: all sensors nominal, worker on site, permit active.

rows.label: Worker enters restricted zone
rows.narration: Worker moves into the restricted zone boundary while continuing hot work.

rows.label: Helmet removed
rows.narration: Worker removes helmet mid-task — PPE compliance violation detected.

incident.description: Field operator observed without required helmet while performing hot work in a restricted zone.
incident.root_cause: PPE compliance check was not enforced before task start.

rows.label: Gas leak
rows.narration: Gas concentration spikes to a critical level near the work area.

incident.description: Hydrocarbon vapor concentration spiked to 92 ppm near the Zone-D work area during active hot work.
incident.root_cause: Suspected valve seal failure on the nearby process line.

rows.label: Gas leak increases
rows.narration: Gas concentration continues climbing; conditions deteriorate further.

rows.label: Small fire
rows.narration: Temperature and smoke readings cross critical thresholds — a small fire has broken out.

incident.description: Small fire detected near the Zone-D work area, coinciding with an active gas leak and critical temperature/smoke readings.
incident.root_cause: Ignition source suspected from ongoing hot work in proximity to the gas leak.

rows.label: Emergency response
rows.narration: Emergency response engine dispatches evacuation and stop-work actions; sensors begin trending back down as responders act.

rows.label: Incident resolved
rows.narration: Zone stabilized: readings return to normal, worker safe, permit closed pending review.
